2 Tate Olson

  • Position G
  • Year Senior
  • Height 6-7
  • Weight 220
  • Hometown New York Mills, Minn.
  • High School New York Mills HS
  • Bio
  • Related
  • Stats
  • Historical

Biography

2025-26 (Sr)
• NSIC North Player of the Week (Nov. 18, 2025)
Appeared in 4 games, totaling 73 points, 38 rebounds, 14 assists, 10 steals and 4 blocks… Shot 25-for-43 from the field, 8-for-17 on 3-pointers and 15-for-20 at the line… Sat out most of the season due to injury… Scored a season-high 25 points on 9-for-14 shooting with a season-high 4 steals at Henderson State University on Nov. 14… Pulled down a season-high 16 rebounds, including a season-high 14 defensive, with a season-high 7 assists, 3 blocks and 3 3-pointers at Southern Arkansas University on Nov. 15…

2024-25 (Jr)
• Academic All-NSIC
Played 29 games and started all 29 games for the Beavers... Totaled most minutes played for the team with 944... Led the team in most points scored with 341 points averaging  second most points with 11.8 per game shooting 49.8% from the field, 37.3% behind the three and 76.1% from the free throw line... Led the team in rebounding with 255 and 8.8 per game.... Led the team in assists with 80... Collected 19 steals and was second in the team with 9 blocks... Recorded 12 double doubles for the season as well as scored twice career high 20 points...

2023-24 (So.)
One of three Beavers to play in all 29 games this season totaling 644 minutes... Scored 190 points averaging 6.6 per game shooting 48.3 percent from the field, 31.1 percent from beyond the arc, and 71.9 percent from the free throw line... Was third on the team with 165 rebounds averaging 5.7 per game... Tallied 40 assists on offense along with 22 steals and a team leading 13 blocks on defense... Scored a career-high 17 points against Minnesota State Mankato on Jan. 12.

2022-23 (Fr)
Played in 17 games this season and started in 2 with 148 minutes played, 8.7 per game... Scored 28 points during the season ... Shooting 38.5 percent from the field, 30.8 percent from three and 4-6 from the line... Had 41 rebounds 2.4 per game, 10 assists, 5 block, and 4 steals... Recorded a season-high 8 rebounds against at Northern State on 12/10/22 .

Career Single-Game Highs:
Points: 25 vs Henderson State (11/14/25)
FG made: 9 vs Henderson State (11/14/25)
FG attempted: 17 vs Southern Arkansas (11/15/25)
3FG made: 5, 2x, last vs Central Missouri (11/8/24)
3FG attempted: 8, 2x, last vs Southern Arkansas (11/15/25)
FT made: 6 vs Henderson State (11/14/25)
FT attempted: 9 vs Henderson State (11/14/25)
Rebounds: 16 vs Southern Arkansas (11/15/25)
Assists: 8 at Minnesota Crookston (12/6/24)
Blocks: 3, 3x, last vs Southern Arkansas (11/15/25)
Steals: 4 vs Henderson State (11/14/25)

High School
A letter winner in basketball at New York Mills High School under head coach Mike Baune... A three-time Park Region Conference MVP and is the high school’s all-time leader in scoring and assists... Averaged 25.0 points, 12.6 rebounds and 6.9 assists as a senior... A two-time Park Region Conference MVP and is the high school’s all-time leader in scoring (1,952 points) and assists (558)... Led the conference in scoring three times, in assists twice and rebounds once... Helped lead the Eagles to two Park Region Conference Championships and one sub-section championship... Also a letter winner in track & field at NYMHS.

Personal
Born April 26, 2004 to Bryan and Tammy Olson... A member of the “A” Honor Roll throughout high school... Majoring in exercise science at BSU.
